arts.ttl: Dominic Solanke reveals private conversation with Harry Kane and insists Tottenham 'are not scared of anyone' ahead of their Premier League clash against Manchester United
arts.sum: Solanke appears to have found his footing in north London and will arrive at Old Trafford to face Manchester United on Sunday on the back of two goals in as many games.

arts.ttl: Tottenham predicted lineup vs Man Utd
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are searching for a fourth straight victory in all competitions when they travel to Old Trafford on Sunday afternoon to face Manchester United in the Premier League. However, a trip to Old Trafford will prove a much trickier proposition, with Postecoglou failing to win there last season.

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Tottenham
arts.sum: After a frustrating goalless draw with Crystal Palace last weekend where Man Utd's profligacy robbed them of victory, the Red Devils responded with a tepid 1-1 stalemate with Dutch outfit FC Twente in their Europa League opener. RB: Noussair Mazraoui - A promising start to the Moroccan's Man Utd career will be put to the test on Sunday if Spurs skipper Heung-min Son is passed fit .

arts.ttl: Key quotes part two of Ten Hag press conference ahead of Man Utd v Tottenham
arts.sum: We have a good squad, but with young players. I don't read, of course, all the criticism, not even possible, but I don't want either to know.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag has explained Manchester United's new transfer strategy in two words
arts.sum: Man Utd have started to focus on signing young players and Erik ten Hag could field their youngest starting XI in the Premier League for nearly five years this weekend.

arts.ttl: Dominic Solanke details private Harry Kane conversation in Tottenham dressing room
arts.sum: MANCHESTER UNITED vs TOTTENHAM: Dominic Solanke is looking to make it three goals in as many matches at Old Trafford despite claiming he will never be able to replace goal-scoring icon Harry Kane at Spurs

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag makes worrying admission over Man Utd's transfer decisions amid growing pressure
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag - who is under pressure as Manchester United manager - has suggested that Profit and Sustainability regulations mean the club cannot continue to break the bank in the transfer market

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag says stuttering Manchester United must ‘respect the criticism’
arts.sum: Ten Hag was annoyed by United’s mentality and toothlessness against FC Twente.

arts.ttl: Amanda Staveley sets deadline to complete investment in Newcastle's rivals Tottenham
arts.sum: After a painful departure from Newcastle, Amanda Staveley and Mehrdad Ghodoussi – guests of Spurs at last weekend’s visit of Brentford – are in advanced talks to buy a sizeable stake in the north London club

arts.ttl: No class, no energy, no progress - Manchester United response to Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Manchester United still have a lot to improve under Erik ten Hag but some supporters feel time is running out for the Dutch manager
